message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on print() and list append operations

Fixed silent truncation/data loss in runtime operations:

builtins/io.zig (print function):
- All output.appendSlice() operations now panic on OOM instead of silently truncating
- Affects: separator appending, end newline, value formatting (None, strings, numbers, bools, objects)
- Critical: print() silently truncating output would cause incorrect/incomplete program output

builtins.zig (list operations):
- ArrayList.append() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping items
- PyValue.list.append() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping items
- Critical: list append failures would cause silent data loss

All changed from `catch {}` to `catch unreachable` to fail loudly on allocation failures.
